home.hero_subtitle: Where natural texture becomes the ultimate expression of accomplished luxury.
home.hero_description: For over ten years, Elsa Coiffure has been redefining Afro hair art. Each crown we sculpt is a unique piece, blending ancestral techniques with avant-garde silhouettes. More than a hairstyle, it is a legacy of elegance that we celebrate.
home.bridal_subtitle: Exquisite bridal styling for the modern woman. Discover our curated wedding packages designed to make your natural crown shine.
home.bridal_card_desc: Crafting sculptural silhouettes that bring a contemporary edge to bridal elegance.
home.curated_title: Expertly curated by the Elsa Coiffure team daily.
home.curated_desc: Every product in our boutique is tested and used in our salon. We stand by the efficacy of every ingredient.

about.founded_text: Founded on the belief that natural texture is the ultimate luxury, Elsa Coiffure has redefined Afro hair artistry for over a decade. Our journey began with a single vision: to create a sanctuary where heritage meets high-fashion.
about.masterpiece_text: Every crown we style is a masterpiece. From intricate traditional techniques to modern avant-garde silhouettes, we blend technical excellence with a deep understanding of natural hair health. We don't just style hair; we celebrate a legacy of elegance and self-expression.
about.bridal_desc: Celebrate your most beautiful day with artisanal bridal styling. We specialize in sophisticated natural updos and cultural silhouettes for the modern bride.
about.traditional_desc: Cultural heritage woven into sophisticated styles.
about.modern_desc: Sculptural silhouettes with a contemporary edge.
about.veil_desc: Artful integration of veils into natural textures.
about.natural_desc: Celebrating your unique texture with gold-standard care.
about.unique_bride: Every bride is unique. Inquire today for a personalized wedding consultation and discovery session.

help.title: How can we help?
help.subtitle: Find common answers or contact our team.
help.still_questions_desc: Our team remains available to assist you.
help.q1: How do I book an appointment?
help.a1: Click booking, select your service and date, then confirm your appointment.
help.q2: Can I reschedule or cancel an appointment?
help.a2: Yes, you can cancel your appointment from My Appointments based on salon policy.
help.a3: Orders are processed and shipped depending on product availability.
help.q4: Do you offer returns or refunds?
help.a4: Returns are reviewed according to salon policy and product condition.
help.q5: How do I earn loyalty points?
help.a5: You earn points based on purchases and services. Check the loyalty page for details.
help.q6: How can I update my profile information?
help.a6: Open the Settings page to view your account information.

faq.title: FAQ & Hair Care Guide
faq.subtitle: Expert advice for your premium hair journey.
faq.no_matches: No matches found for your search.
faq.q1_title: How do I prepare for my braiding appointment?
faq.q1_content: For the best results, arrive with freshly washed and detangled hair.
faq.q2_content: Cancellations must be made in advance according to salon policy.
faq.q3_title: How long do Elsa Coiffure extensions last?
faq.q3_content: With proper care, premium extensions can last several weeks.
faq.q4_title: Do you offer services for children?
faq.q4_content: Yes, we offer selected services for children with adapted care products.
faq.tip1_desc: Use silk or satin protection overnight to reduce friction.
faq.tip2_desc: Use a light mist to hydrate scalp and roots.
faq.tip3_desc: Avoid excessive tension and heavy oil buildup.

consultation.title: Tell us about your crown
consultation.subtitle: Help our stylists prepare your visit by sharing your hair history.
consultation.hair_pattern: What is your natural hair pattern?
consultation.chemical_color_desc: Includes bleach or permanent dye in the last 6 months
consultation.heat_damage_desc: Regular use of high-heat styling tools
